mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obWblRePrint-sql-oracle.xml - selectWblRePrintSql - 운송장 재출력 - 대상조회 */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,OH.CTKEY ,OH.OWKEY ,OH.OBHDKEY ,OH.OBHDTYPECD ,OH.OBSTATUSCD ,OH.OBHDDAY ,OH.DLVRYCORPCD ,DLC.DLVRYCORPNM ,OH.WBLNO ,OH.PCKGURKEY ,OH.PCKGDATE ,OH.PCKGSTNBARCODE ,OH.CLASSIFCNTRBARCODE ,CNTR.CNTRBARCODE ,OH.PCKGBOXBARCODE ,BOX.BOXNM ,OH.WKTYPECD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP DLC ON OH.CTKEY = DLC.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = DLC.OWKEY AND OH.DLVRYCORPCD = DLC.DLVRYCORPCD LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT PD.CTKEY, PD.OWKEY, PD.OBHDKEY, MAX(PC.CNTRBARCODE) AS CNTRBARCODE FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PK_CNTR_DT PC ON PD.CTKEY = PC.CTKEY AND PD.OWKEY = PC.OWKEY AND PD.PIHDKEY = PC.PIHDKEY AND PD.PIDTKEY = PC.PIDTKEY GROUP BY PD.CTKEY, PD.OWKEY, PD.OBHDKEY ) CNTR ON OH.CTKEY = CNTR.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = CNTR.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = CNTR.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX ON OH.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY AND OH.PCKGBOXBARCODE = BOX.BOXBARCODE WHERE #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('65', '70') ORDER BY OH.PCKGDATE DESC

/* wms-outbound-obWblRePrint-sql-oracle.xml - selectWblRePrintDetailSql - 운송장 재출력 - 상품정보 조회 */ SELECT OD.CTKEY ,OD.OWKEY ,OD.ICKEY ,IC.ICNM ,OD.CNFRMQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('65', '70') ORDER BY OD.ICKEY
